evals.prompt: Set up the initial UI system for a new SaaS dashboard using Tailwind v4.
evals.expected_output: A minimal semantic token foundation with color, type, spacing, radius, shadow, focus, light/dark mode, and source-of-truth guidance.

evals.prompt: Plan a token foundation for a new Figma file that should later map cleanly to code.
evals.expected_output: A Figma-oriented token plan using semantic variables aligned with future CSS custom properties.
assertions: Maps design tokens to code tokens

evals.prompt: We already have globals.css tokens. Decide how to initialize the UI system without breaking it.
evals.expected_output: An inventory-first plan that preserves existing tokens and only proposes documented gaps.
